weeks.description: Cocktail hour energy. Four looks for the night that starts at 9.

prompts.label: Classic Midi
prompts.prompt: A classic black cocktail midi dress, clean tailored silhouette, matte crepe fabric falling just below the knee, bateau neckline, sleeveless, sophisticated natural fabric drape, bright and airy catalog editorial fashion photography, crisp sharp focus, high-detail fabric texture, clean minimalist aesthetic
prompts.sample_prompt: Close-up fashion editorial photograph of a bare shoulder and collarbone of a woman, with the bateau neckline of a matte black crepe cocktail midi dress resting gently against the skin, fine fabric weave visible, smooth natural skin with warm peach undertone, seamless pure white background, bright and airy catalog studio lighting from upper-left with soft diffused shadows, shot on 85mm f/2.8 lens with shallow depth of field, clean minimalist composition, editorial color grading, high-end fashion lookbook aesthetic, photorealistic, sharp focus, no face
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, extra limbs, deformed hands, bad anatomy, low quality, cartoon, painting, text, watermark
